title: 10Pcs Door Stops, Door Stoppers for Floor, Rubber Door Stop, Door Wedges Indoors, Door Wedges Indoors Rubber, Suitable for Home, Office and Other Places Where The Door Needs to be Open
features: Product Specifications: You will receive 10 door stoppers, which is enough for your daily use and replacement.
High-quality materials: The door stops are made of high-quality materials, durable and wear-resistant, and will not leave any wear marks or scratches.
Easy to use: Just place the door wedge firmly under the door, so you don’t have to worry about the door closing.
Suitable for any floor surface: Whether it is wood, tile, cement, vinyl or carpet, these door stoppers for floor will prevent your door from moving.
Versatile: Rubber door stop for various door types, including wooden doors, metal doors, etc. Protect you from the sudden slam of the door in strong winds.
